chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special Sales Tax Reference Application No. 1147 of 2023 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection No. 19 & 26. 2. For order on CMA No. 2649/2023 (Exp) 3. For hearing of main case. 27.11.2025 Mr. Shahid Ali Qureshi, advocate for applicant. Per learned counsel, questions proposed for determination have already been decided against the applicant by the Supreme Court vide judgment in the case reported as 2023 SCMR 681. He states that said judgment is squarely binding on this Court, therefore, in view thereof, this reference may be dismissed as withdrawn. Order accordingly. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 47 subsection 5 of Sales Tax Act, 1990. Judge Judge Ayaz p.s.
